## Task

List expected files or docs.

## Safety Notes

Confirm the task does not require real personal data or weakening security

## Done When

- [ ] tests or docs are updated
- [ ] synthetic data only
- [ ] `ruff check .` passes
- [ ] `pytest -W error` passes
